features: 【PREMIUM QUALITY】: High quality nail brushes are made of the finest nylon and each process uses the most stringent quality testing of its peers to ensure durability and a smooth, soft and pliable feel.
【COMFORTABLE TO USE】: The body of the nail art brush is light and comfortable, easy to hold and paint, helping create beautiful nail work without any hassle!
【BUNDLE SET】: Professional nail art brushes come with 2 different brush heads: Round/Falt brushes & magic extender gel tool. effect for drawing different patterns.

【EFFICIENT CREATIVITY】: With this nail art liner brush, you can quickly turn the ideas in your mind into reality, and in a short time, you can complete stunning nail art designs that will make your nails stand out from the crowd.
【Perfect Gift】: This portable and easy-to-use nail art pen is not only suitable for professional nail salons or home use, but also a perfect gift.
description: Product description ZEOHBETY 2Pcs Nail Brushes for Gel Nails,Pink Directions To use the nail brushes, place the brush so that the tip is facing the nails. For nail polish application, move the brush smoothly and evenly along the nail plate. To draw patterns, use gentle, controlled movements. Safety Warning 1 Manufacturer Contact Information 1 See more
